title: Angle Gauge eOUTIL Digital Protractor Inclinometer Angle Finder with V-Groove Magnetic Base, Precision Bevel for Automobile Woodworking Building Drilling Machinery Masonry
features: V-groove Magnetic Base: This magnetic V-groove base of digital angle gauge can be firmly attach to ferrous metal surfaces like pipe, steel construction framing, metal fabrication. Rugged durable aluminum frame for precision leveling measurement

Absolute & Relative Measurement: This digital protractor has absolute angle measurement to test whether the working surface is on the level to check roof slopes, wheel alignment, etc. Moreover, this magnetic level lets you check the relative angles between the surfaces

High Accuracy: Accurate to the ±0.1° at 0° and 90°; ±0.2° at other angles. Displays angle and bevel readings in degrees, pitch IN/FT, mm/M, and percent slope. With reading hold function, it is convenient to record by this level digital inclinometer bevel box. Moreover, you can have an accurate measurement of the angles between two

Backlight LCD Display With Audio Indicator: Featuring a large, bright LCD display you can easily read the measurements whatever the light conditions. The display value reverses automatically when the electronic level is upside down. Acoustic signal routing via beeps when you reached 0° or 90°

IP65 Waterproof And Dust-proof Level: It has IP65 protection which makes it suitable for use in harsh environmental conditions. The inclinometer battery cover and other high-sealing truction design make sure its good working in an environment with splashing water and dust
description: Product Description Overview: This inclinometer works as a 3-In-1 dimensional measurement tool. So, the machine is perfect to use as an angle finder, digital level, and protractor. The digital gadget also allows you to only measure the angles of the horizontal plane. Moreover, you can have an accurate measurement of the angles between two measured surfaces. Widely used in wood & machinery industry, machinery, medical fields and etc Package Included: 1× Digital Protractor 1× Storage Bag 1× User Manual 1× Screwdriver Standard Factory Package DIGITAL LEVEL Flips in upside down position that is functional in all positions Heavy Duty Extruded Anodized Aluminum Frame Absolute and Relative measurement conversion Beep function for your operation precision Portable size, easy to transport and provide highly accurate readouts V-Groove on the measurement base, for easy attach to round pipes Powerful built-in magnet on the base secures the attachment to iron surface V-Groove Magnetic Base The V-Groove base with strong magnets enables strong attachment over a curve or cylindrical magnetic surfaces such as metal pipeline or shafts Digital Inversion & Beeper Function Display always reads upright, no matter which way it is turned, it has enabling you to read out angles from any direction.With Beeper / Sound Function that can be set IP65 Rating Dust-proof & Waterproof It has IP65 protection which makes it suitable for use in harsh environmental conditions.
